query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: Fetch Kristiansand municipality boundary to filter storm-surge and building data

2.description: Fetch 200-year storm-surge areas within Kristiansand municipality

4.description: Filter buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: Calculate distance from each building to the nearest storm-surge area

6.description: Sort buildings by shortest distance to storm-surge areas

8.description: Join municipality and county names to the final result
